info.name: text-delete
info.text: Make sure to keep the roots strong and your ideas will bloom healthy.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Prune them from time to time so they can grow even stronger.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Fresh air and patience will ensure your ideas can blossom to their fullness.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes ideas can be invasive and aren't always welcomed, so make sure to water them and help them to grow wisely.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: They grow and help give you fresh air to breathe, but only if they're taken care of with love.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Give them fertile ground to grow, otherwise they may get stuck in the ground and never get a chance to flourish.
